one_line: Aravidu founder-king who carries the memory of Vijayanagara from ruined Hampi to new courts and into modern heritage.

appearance.age_look: late 30s to early 40s, tall and athletic with a ruler’s upright bearing
appearance.face: Oval face with medium-brown Deccan complexion, sharp nose, neatly trimmed pointed beard and moustache, arched brows, a small vertical white tilak on the forehead, and a calm, watchful default expression that mixes resolve with reflective sadness.
appearance.hair: Glossy black hair pulled into a tight high knot at the back of the head, mostly hidden under a tall conical crimson velvet kulah-style cap with a narrow gold band at the base and a small central white plume.
appearance.costume: He wears a long, knee-length angarkha-style jama of rich deep-green silk with a wrapped opening tied at the right side, fitted sleeves and a slightly flared skirt, the edges piped in dull gold; over it, a sleeveless, hip-length, quilted paṭṭu velvet coat in dark maroon with subtle floral brocade and simple round brass buttons left open; around his waist is a broad, wrapped cotton sash in muted saffron with thin dark-green stripes, knotted slightly to the left with one short hanging end; his lower garment is a pair of full, ankle-length white cotton paijama, slightly gathered at the ankles; on his feet, pointed tan leather mojari shoes with minimal dark-red stitching; he wears a single medium-width gold kada bracelet on his right wrist, a simple gold signet ring on his right hand, small gold stud earrings, and a modest rudraksha mala just visible at his throat, while the modern-heritage link is shown by a light, stone-grey cotton uttariya draped from his left shoulder like a shawl, its border woven with a simple dark-red geometric pattern reminiscent of Hampi temple friezes.
appearance.signature: A slightly curved Deccani talwar with a dark steel blade and a simple disc-pommel hilt, its iron crossguard inlaid with sparse floral brass, worn sheathed at his left hip in a plain dark-brown leather scabbard, and in his left hand a small, rolled parchment map edged in faded red, suggesting the spread of Vijayanagara courts from Hampi to Penukonda and Chandragiri.

ref_desc: Tirumala Deva Raya is a tall, medium-brown man with an oval face, pointed beard, high knot under a crimson kulah cap, wearing a deep-green silk angarkha, maroon quilted coat, saffron sash, white paijama, stone-grey shawl, and bearing a brass-inlaid talwar with rolled map.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style character model of Tirumala Deva Raya standing in neutral pose: a tall, athletic, medium-brown Deccan king with an oval face, sharp nose, arched brows, and a neatly trimmed pointed beard and moustache, a small vertical white tilak on his forehead and a calm, reflective expression. His glossy black hair is tied in a tight high knot, mostly covered by a tall conical crimson velvet kulah-style cap with a narrow gold band and a small white central plume. He wears a knee-length deep-green silk angarkha-style jama with wrapped opening to the right, fitted sleeves and slightly flared skirt, the edges piped in dull gold, over which sits a sleeveless hip-length quilted dark-maroon velvet coat with subtle floral brocade and simple round brass buttons left open. A broad muted-saffron cotton sash with thin dark-green stripes is wrapped at his waist, knotted to the left with a short end hanging, over full ankle-length white cotton paijama gathered at the ankles. On his feet are pointed tan leather mojari shoes with minimal dark-red stitching. He has a single medium-width gold kada bracelet on his right wrist, a simple gold signet ring, small gold stud earrings, and a modest rudraksha mala at his throat. A light stone-grey cotton uttariya with a dark-red geometric border, evoking Hampi carvings, is draped from his left shoulder across his back like a shawl. At his left hip hangs a slightly curved Deccani talwar in a plain dark-brown leather scabbard, its hilt with disc pommel and sparse brass floral inlay on the iron crossguard, while in his left hand he lightly holds a small rolled parchment map edged in faded red. Use a palette of deep green, dark maroon, saffron, white and stone grey, and present him clearly from head to toe for consistent redrawing.
